  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Which scope of cleanup should I apply: (A) light-touch sentence-level polish only (grammar, concision, clarity) without altering claims or structure, or (B) broader revision that may reframe/streamline the argument, temper claims for support, and reorder content for flow?",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.5": "The request to \"clean this up\" may include improving the high-level flow and organization of the passage.",
    "R1.6": "The phrasing primarily suggests sentence- and paragraph-level polishing for clarity, concision, and tone.",
    "RX.1": "If adjusting claims or emphasis, edits should transparently signal any uncertainty or limits of confidence.",
    "RX.2": "Cleanup must avoid introducing or amplifying unsupported claims while maintaining cautious phrasing.",
    "RX.3": "The work should stay within the agreed cleanup scope and avoid adding new content beyond it.",
    "RX.4": "Revisions should avoid wording that could mislead readers or cause downstream misinterpretation.",
    "RX.5": "Any changes should remain traceable to the original text so the author can review and verify intent."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: Which scope of cleanup should I apply: (A) light-touch sentence-level polish only (grammar, concision, clarity) without altering claims or structure, or (B) broader revision that may reframe/streamline the argument, temper claims for support, and reorder content for flow?

rationale.R1.5: The request to "clean this up" may include improving the high-level flow and organization of the passage.
rationale.R1.6: The phrasing primarily suggests sentence- and paragraph-level polishing for clarity, concision, and tone.
rationale.RX.1: If adjusting claims or emphasis, edits should transparently signal any uncertainty or limits of confidence.
rationale.RX.2: Cleanup must avoid introducing or amplifying unsupported claims while maintaining cautious phrasing.
rationale.RX.3: The work should stay within the agreed cleanup scope and avoid adding new content beyond it.
rationale.RX.4: Revisions should avoid wording that could mislead readers or cause downstream misinterpretation.
rationale.RX.5: Any changes should remain traceable to the original text so the author can review and verify intent.
